title: Fish Traps Remastered
description: Auto-fishing block for auto-fishing... with blocks
body:
fish-traps

This mod adds an automated Fish Traps called the Fish Fence.

Fish fences come in three grades: wood, iron, and diamond. Different fish fences require different amounts of time to catch fish and yield different items.

Fish fences need to be surrounded by water on a flat surface before they will generate items that can be obtained through fishing.

Bait needs to be placed inside the fish fence; otherwise, the catching speed will decrease significantly.

The Forge version fixes the configuration issues left by the original author.

Original Mod Download

Description:

Mod originally created by @kylertlove . mc mod for auto fishing. Supports both Forge and Fabric.

Disclaimer:

  • I am not the original creator of the mod! I just ported to 1.20.1 and 1.21.1.
  • The idea, resources (textures, logo…) and most of the code was created by @kylertlove.
